steps.title: Define the demand change
steps.content: The buyers had not previously wanted vintage action figures, but rising prices drew them into the market. The blank needs a word for causing demand to appear.

steps.title: Use the word for drawing out
steps.content: The matching word means calling forth or drawing out something that was not already present. Choice A means meeting existing demand, Choice B is unidiomatic with demand, and Choice C means taking advantage of demand that already exists. The answer is D.
